questionHtml:
Two protons, travelling in opposite directions, collide. Each has a total energy of 3.35 GeV.

Calculate the gamma (γ) factor for one of the protons.

meta.title: Calculate the gamma (γ) factor for one of the protons.
breadcrumbLabels: Option A: Relativity (Additional higher level option topics)
